title: Copilot Studio design pattern / grounding contract (portfolio demo)
description: Grounding pattern (allowlist + bindings + refusals) inspired by Copilot Studio / tabular governance — a portable JSON manifest for demos, not a deployed Copilot Studio topic flow or tenant agent.

user_phrases: how are we doing in Chicago
topic_bindings.citation_rule: Echo active slicers (metro, risk_tier, leased_month) and scored_at max per gold contract.
State risk_tier semantics (D1 = lowest modeled churn sensitivity in this demo).
Never fabricate lineage; if NULL, say unknown and route to ITSM ticket template.

required_citations_pattern: Always state filter context (metro, cohort month, ecosystem segment) and data_as_of timestamp when discussing metrics.
synthetic_data_banner: Demo portfolio uses synthetic leases; production copilots must read from authorized lakehouse tables with RLS/CLS parity to Power BI semantic models.
